heading: Factfinding panel
label: 797k Factfinding panel
notes: References in TextThe Railway Labor Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , which is classified principally to chapter 8 (§ 151 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act May 20, 1926, ch. 34744 Stat. 577section 151 of this title
amendments: References in TextThe Railway Labor Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , which is classified principally to chapter 8 (§ 151 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act May 20, 1926, ch. 34744 Stat. 577section 151 of this title

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: a Purpose
children.text: The Corporation shall enter into collective bargaining agreements with its employees which provide for the establishment of one or more advisory factfinding panels, chaired by a neutral expert in industrial relations, for purposes of recommending changes in operating practices and procedures which result in greater productivity to the maximum extent practicable.

children.heading: National Mediation Board
children.label: b National Mediation Board
children.text: The National Mediation Board shall appoint public members to any panel established by an agreement entered into under this subparagraph, and shall perform such functions contained in the agreement as are consistent with the duties of such Board under the Railway Labor Act [ et seq.].45 U.S.C. 151

children.heading: Other functions
children.label: c Other functions
children.text: The factfinding panel may, before making its report to the parties, provide mediation, concil­iation, and other assistance to the parties.
